titleStmt.title: SII 24.110: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 110. (A.R. No. 37 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of 100 sheep for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻap pāmālai miṭainta parumaṇittiraḷ puyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jeyamakaḷiruppa tirumaka ḷoru tani tiḷaippak kalai makaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppo
ṭu nāvakattiruppa ticaitoṟum tikiri(ti)yoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvaṉa muḻutum kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai mimicainiṟpa karuṅkali Oḷitti vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭaitteluṅ
kavimaṉ vilaṅkalmimicai Ēṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyaik kanleri parukavum Aympaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalattāṅkinitiruntu vaṭa ticai
Aṭippaṭuttaruḷi teṉṟicai tarumamum tavamu ( n=tarumamum tavamu) n tānamum taḻaippa vetamum meymmaiyum men meloṅki ceḻiyar veñcuram puka [cera lar kaṭal puka va
ḻitaru ciṅkaṇanañci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟai Iṭaka ṭa koṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai mannarum tanit lā
rimaiyiliṉṟañcat teri ḻuteḻa mallai Imaiyat tanna
ruppa Āṅkavan makiḻum kaṅkai pākiya terivaiyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal Iva ṉa Uṭa
tiruppa cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun taruḷiya pāṇṭi kulācani
vaḷ nāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattu Āḻvār kku cikāriyam puli valamuṭaiya śrī vaiyiṣṇavavāri yam tiruveṅkaṭa
ttaārum tāmaraic cerik kurukai kāvalan m cempiyan māteviyil tiru Akamuṭaiyā Ārk kāṭuṭaiyānampiyum kantāṭai validāsanu
rum dāsarum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarika nampiyum nārāyaṇanum Āritan cirākavan cikāri māṟaṉum Āritan kurukaikkāvala
ciriḷaṅko garuṭavākaṉanum koyil kaṇakku kūttan Ampala tiruvaraṅkappiriyanum civayiṣṇavakkaṇakku Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyānāna śrī vayiṣṇavappiriyanum Ivvaṉaivom
ṭṭuk kuṟumpūr nāṭṭu mukantanūr mukantanū(r) ruṭaiyānum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷukku nitta māka Oru nuntā viḷakku Erikka tiruvaraṅka yāka Āṇṭu va
kiya kaṭan=ta cennel toṇṇūṟṟu Irunāḻi kkum cipaṇṭāra civayiṣṇavāriyaṟku Eṟa Aḷakkak kaṭavarkaḷāka Āḻvār liṭaiyā Aḻakiya vakkoṉuṭa
viḷakkeṇṇaikkuṭalāka(ka)viṭṭa Āṭu 100 Ivvāṭu nū(ṟṟu)kku var mūvarum perāṭāka Āṇṭu Ivarkaḷum Ivar vaṟkat tārumey cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavarkaḷāka
kaiyile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvarāka sammatittu I nampi ṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Itu celuttivikkakkaṭavom māṉom tiruvaraṅka kaṇakku Ampalak kūttanāna tiruvaraṅka piriya
neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅka neḻuttu Ivar Irā matittu
ṭutten Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa keṭnena Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ippaṭikku Ivai ḷāneḻuttu mpi pittar Eḻuttu
ṅkaikāval dāsaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivainālūr tiruva ṭaiyā nampi Eḻuttu ñcolai dāsaneḻuttu kantāṭai paṭai
Ivai Āritan puṇṭa Ārāvamutu Āna cīpuṇṭarikaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan
Ippaṭikku tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Itu śrīvayiṣṇavaraṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
